question: I want somewhere calm to go, with something to do and a place to park. What would you suggest?

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: find quiet zones (low noise), find open attractions in those zones, find free parking in those zones | MAP: smart-environment-and-temperature-sensors-mock (noise sensors), smart-tourist-attractions-mock (attractions), smart-parking-mock (parking) | CHAIN: get_noise_sensors -> get_attractions (filter by zoneIds) -> get_parking (filter by zoneIds) | COMBINE: sql join task_get_noise_sensors, task_get_attractions, task_get_parking | FILTER: noise sensors (sensorType=noise), attractions (status=open), parking (status=free) | VALIDATE: ✓

input.sql_query: SELECT n.zoneId, n.lastReading as noiseLevel, a.name as attraction, a.category, p.location as parkingLocation FROM get_noise_sensors n JOIN get_attractions a ON n.zoneId = a.zoneId JOIN get_parking p ON n.zoneId = p.zoneId ORDER BY n.lastReading ASC LIMIT 5
